questionHtml: The block falls a distance 0.50 m after its release before hitting the ground. Show that the block hits the ground 0.55 s after release.
markschemeHtml:
a = 3.27 «ms−2» / a = g/3 ✔

t = 2 s a = 2 × 0.50 3.27   ✔

= 0.55 «s»

Do not apply ECF from MP1 to MP2 if for a=g, giving answer 0.32 s.

meta.title: The block falls a distance 0.50 m after its release before hitting the ground. Show that the block hits the ground 0.55 s after release.
